body: The /items endpoint returns everything at once. Add limit/offset pagination with sane defaults and document the params. Acceptance: default page size of 20, configurable via query params.
title: Add pagination to the items list endpoint

body: Customers want to download their report data. Add a 'Download CSV' action that streams the current report. Acceptance: CSV matches the on-screen table.
title: Export report as CSV

body: Signup accepts malformed emails. Add server-side email validation and a clear error message. Acceptance: invalid emails are rejected with a 422.
title: Validate email format on signup

body: The dashboard takes 4-5s to load for accounts with lots of data. Profile it and reduce time-to-interactive. Acceptance: under 1.5s for a typical account.
title: Users report slow load on the dashboard

body: The /items endpoint returns everything at once. Add limit/offset pagination with sane defaults and document the params.
title: Add pagination to the items list endpoint
